intent: Dragging any selected file or folder onto a folder moves all selected files and folders, while unselected drags remain single-item moves; mobile files use long-press drag.
assumptions: Selected dragged files represent all selected files and folders.
Selected dragged folders represent all selected files and folders.
Unselected dragged items represent only themselves.
Existing folder move services remain the execution path.
risks: Memoized file cards can hold stale callbacks after unrelated selection changes.
Mobile file long press must suppress the follow-up preview click.
Batch expansion must not change unselected single-item moves.
Self-folder drops must stay filtered by the action layer.
verification: npm test -- FileListBatchDragMove.test.tsx FileCardMobileDragMove.test.tsx FolderCardDragMove.test.tsx useFileActionsDragMove.test.tsx
